description_long: This object is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy upper receiver and a prominent rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The body is angular, with a pronounced pistol grip and a short, thick barrel extending from the front. The magazine well is integrated into the grip, typical of compact automatic weapons, and the trigger guard is robust and squared. The upper receiver features a series of ridges or rails, likely for modular attachments, and the rear sight is fixed and raised. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external embellishments, and the surface appears matte and non-reflective, suggesting a tactical, urban-use firearm.
description: A compact, boxy submachine gun-style rifle with a rail system, pistol grip, and short barrel, finished in a matte, tactical color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short, thick barrel and the alignment of the upper rail and front sight.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the upper rail, the pistol grip, and the magazine well integrated into the grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight and the symmetry of the upper receiver and rail system.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with additional detail on the ejection port and side controls.
